content: I think we've pretty well covered those questions. But it occurs to me that my best conceivable healing (dreamed of) would come with and from the compassionate understanding and actions that would flow throughout and amongst us all in this emergent paradigm. Not that I wouldn't do well to pay better attention to my physical well being, I'm sort of lax in that department. But soon enough I anticipate better diet and much more restful lifestyle with the life change I anticipate will come shortly come to fruition
